text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, January 12. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Great progress. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: The lawn mower is having issues starting. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: That is a clean implementation. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The lawn mower is having issues starting. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
